utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Here you go Pheebs . Who else wants one of my special homemade brownies ?

utterances.text: Okay , I am not gonna have one .

utterances.text: All right I will have one .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So what a matter , you need a dentist ? I have got a good one .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No thanks , I have a good one too . I just , I , I can not see him .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: See that is the problem with invisible dentists .

utterances.text: Why ? Why can not you go to him ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_Why can not you go to him ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Because , every time I go to the dentist , somebody dies .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is so weird , because every time I go to the dentist , I look down the hygienist blouse .

10_every time I go to the dentist , somebody dies .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , yeah , first there was my aunt Mary , and then there was umm , John , my mailman , and then my , my cowboy friend Albino Bob .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And all these people actually died ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yes , while I was in the chair !

emotion_cause.span: 15_Yes , while I was in the chair !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That is why I take such good care of my teeth now , you know , it is not about oral hygiene , I floss to save lives !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Pheebs , come on , you did not kill anybody , these people just happened to die when you went to the dentist .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is , it is , it is just ah , a coincidence .
